bird.name: 莫岛角鸮
bird.summary: 莫岛角鸮（學名：Otus moheliensis），鴟鴞科角鴞屬下的一種，是科摩羅群島的特有種。 此鳥僅在科摩羅群島內，莫愛利島上的其中一座山上生活。種群數目大約為400頭。由於分佈狹窄，因此在IUCN紅色名錄內列為極危物種。其棲地正面臨大規模的森林開伐威脅。

relations.subject: 莫岛角鸮
relations.evidence: As well as habitat loss, other threats to the Moheli scops owl include hunting and black rats, which may eat its eggs and young but also compete with it for food
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 莫岛角鸮
relations.evidence: As well as habitat loss, other threats to the Moheli scops owl include hunting and black rats, which may eat its eggs and young but also compete with it for food
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
